# Contributors

Thank you to all the contributors who have made this project possible!

## List of Contributors

- Muhammad Ahmad - [ahmad-junior](https://github.com/ahmad-junior)

## How to Contribute

1. Clone the repository.
2. Create a new branch for your feature or fix.
3. Make your changes.
4. Submit a pull request.

We appreciate your contributions!

> If your name is missing or if you would like to remain anonymous,
> please [contact us!](https://flagsdev.com/legal/contact)
